description:
Collect inventory data and metrics of your hosts and sends it to the New Relic platform.


What's Changed
- fix:Fix hash character escaping in nri-flex YAML config parsing in #2028
- fix: remove trailing slash in mandatory prefix when path is empty in #2037
- Bump fluent bit version to 3.2.10 in #2045
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-docker to v2.5.0 in #2027
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-prometheus to v2.25.0 in #2016
- bump dependency versions in #2046
- chore: Upgrade go version to 1.23.8 in #2059
- chore: Update log level in #2053
Full Changelog: https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/compare/1.63.1...1.64.0
